# Feature request

Thanks for suggesting an improvement.

Agent Radio is local-first and solo-maintained, so small, focused features are easiest to review and maintain.

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?


## Proposed solution

What would you like Agent Radio to do?


## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or other designs did you try?


## Local-first and security impact

Would this feature read, store, send, or expose local plaintext state, workspace paths, messages, config, or MCP/client settings?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes; details below
